raw_consumer_statement: I PURCHAED SOME DESIGNER BAGS FROM XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX FOR {$770.00} THRU XXXX USING MY BARCLAY MASTERCARD ON XXXX. UPON RECEIPT OF THESE ITEMS I NOTED THAT THEY WERE CHEAP PLASTIC AND NOT AT ALL THE REAL LEATHER DEISGNER BAGS AS PROMISED. I FILED A DISPUTE IWTH BARCLAY MC AND THEY WERE NOT AT ALL COOPRATIVE, PUTTING THE BURDEN OF PROOF ON ME. I SPECIFICALLY ASKED THEM IF THEY WOULD REIMBURSE ME FOR PRODUCT VERIFICATION AND THEY CLOSED THE CASE. I REOPENED THE CASE STATING THAT SELLING COUNTERFEIT THIKNGS WAS UNLAWFUL AND THEY STILL SIDED WITH THE MERCHANT. THE CHARGES WERE PLACED BACK ON MY CARD. I EVEN ASKED FOR SHIPPING LABELS TO SEND BACK THE FRAUDULENT ITEMS BUT THE MERCHANT HAS NOT RESPONDED
